final_response: Three open followups, all past due as of today (2026-05-17) — chase in this order this week: (1) SOC2 evidence package from Karen at Acme Compliance — sent 2026-03-30, expected 2026-04-07, already chased once on 2026-04-08 with no response, and the auditor's May window is now active; escalate (don't just nudge again) and if still cold by Tuesday treat as blocked and pursue an alternate evidence path. (2) Q2 budget review from Marcus in Finance — sent 2026-04-18, expected 2026-04-25, never chased; soft nudge Monday. (3) Nimbus office wifi demo — sent 2026-04-20, expected 2026-04-23, never chased; chase once or drop it if the demo isn't still wanted. I've opened today's daybook with the triage and a Monday-morning ordering — start with the SOC2 escalation.
